title: Office closure
body: "The High Commission will close from Wednesday 25 December and will reopen on Monday 30 December. The High Commission will also close on Wednesday 1 January and reopen on Thursday 2 January 2014. If you are a British national needing urgent consular assistance this period, please call 3229100.  The visa section will close from Monday 16 December and will resume operation on Tuesday 7 January 2014. "
